justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered only two alternative days, even when the user expressed frustration and a desire for more flexibility.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by checking for specific times on days that had already been confirmed as fully booked for the requested service.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any appointments and its repetitive suggestions, leading to a prolonged and unproductive conversation.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent repeatedly suggested the same two alternative days (Wednesday, June 10th or Friday, June 12th) even after the user had explicitly tried and failed to find appointments on those days, indicating a lack of intelligent expansion in its search.
